results.title: SA key forward stars again in thrilling win over Vic Country
results.description: South Australia edged Vic Country as Jack Slattery continued his great run of form

results.title: Politician threatens legal action against Mbappe; referee graphic goes viral — WC Daily
results.description: Paraguayan senator Celeste Amarilla has threatened legal action against Kylian Mbappe after the French striker called out her racist comments this week .

results.title: OpenAI gets US approval for broad GPT-5.6 rollout, Axios reports
results.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce has approved ‌a broad launch of ‌OpenAI's advanced GPT 5.6 model, Axios reported ​on Tuesday, citing a person familiar with the matter. OpenAI expects to do a wide release ‌of GPT 5.6 ⁠this week following additional testing and meetings between ⁠the company and government officials, the report said. OpenAI, ​White House, and ‌the U.S. Department of Commerce did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment.

results.title: MLB Highlights: Rangers 8, Angels 3
results.description: Alejandro Osuna hit a three-run homer, Justin Foscue hit a solo homer and finished with two RBI, and the Texas Rangers defeated the Los Angeles Angels 8-3.

results.title: Schwarber homers, Wheeler fans 14 in Phillies’ 4-1 win over Reds
